steps.title: Compare the technologies
steps.content: NeuroPulse develops neuromodulation, which stimulates nervous system structures and influences neural activity. CortexLink develops neuroprostheses, which restore lost sensory, motor, or neural functions.

steps.title: State the functional contrast
steps.content: The correct contrast is influence versus restoration. A mislabels NeuroPulse's technology, B names both companies without explaining the difference, and D gives the brain-computer-interface function to neuroprostheses. The answer is C.
